• I’ll add a small assertion-based test script that imports is_prime, then run it directly with Python.

• Added test_primes.py (+9 -0)
    1 +from primes import is_prime
    2 +
    3 +
    4 +assert not is_prime(1)
    5 +assert is_prime(2)
    6 +assert is_prime(97)
    7 +assert not is_prime(100)
    8 +
    9 +print("tests passed")
